title: Application
content:
This Part shall not apply to wages for any work for which a 
contract was entered into by a principal contractor, nominated sub-
contractor or sub-contractor prior to the commencement* of the 
Employment (Amendment) (No. 4) Ordinance 1977 (54 of 1977).
Editorial Note:
*  Commencement date: 1 November 1977
Sub-contractor’s employees’ wages

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
